FindCandidates.name: FindCandidates

candidates.description: Ranked list of candidates with fit scores, availability, rates, and conflict flags

decision_required.description: Whether a human decision is needed before proceeding to assignment

FindCandidates.signature: FindCandidates(role, required_skills, department, start_date, duration_weeks) -> { candidates: list (e.g. [{'candidate_id': 'EMP-1024', 'name': 'Alice Chen', 'role_fit_score': 92, 'availability_pct': 80}]), total_found: int (e.g. 4), recommendation: dict (e.g. {'candidate_id': 'EMP-1024', 'rationale': 'Highest fit score, no conflicts'}), decision_required: bool (e.g. True) }

AssignResource.name: AssignResource

conflict_reasons.description: Conflict reasons if status is conflict_detected

AssignResource.signature: AssignResource(candidate_id, role, start_date, allocation_pct, requested_by) -> { assignment_id: str (e.g. 'ASGN-48291'), status: str (e.g. 'confirmed'), candidate_name: str (e.g. 'Alice Chen'), effective_start_date: str (e.g. '2026-04-01'), allocation_confirmed_pct: int (e.g. 80), conflict_reasons: list (e.g. []), notifications_sent: list (e.g. ['candidate', 'manager']), follow_up_actions: list (e.g. ['schedule_onboarding_sync']) }

ViewEmployeeWorkload.name: ViewEmployeeWorkload

schedule.description: Current schedule including project commitments and PTO

ViewEmployeeWorkload.signature: ViewEmployeeWorkload(employee_name) -> { employee_name: str (e.g. 'Alice Chen'), current_role: str (e.g. 'Senior Backend Engineer'), skills: list (e.g. [{'skill': 'Python', 'proficiency': 'expert'}]), availability_pct: int (e.g. 60), schedule: dict (e.g. {'current_projects': ['Phoenix'], 'pto': []}) }

UpdateAssignment.name: UpdateAssignment

status.description: Status of the assignment after update

notification_sent.description: Whether stakeholders were notified of the change

UpdateAssignment.signature: UpdateAssignment(assignment_id, role, allocation_pct, start_date) -> { assignment_id: str (e.g. 'ASGN-48292'), status: str (e.g. 'updated'), updated_fields: dict (e.g. {'role': 'Senior Backend Engineer', 'allocation_pct': 80}), notification_sent: bool (e.g. True) }

CancelAssignment.name: CancelAssignment

assignment_id.description: Unique identifier for the cancelled assignment

CancelAssignment.signature: CancelAssignment(assignment_id, notify) -> { assignment_id: str (e.g. 'ASGN-48292'), status: str (e.g. 'cancelled'), notification_sent: bool (e.g. True) }
